response.justification: The candidate is a very poor fit for this role as they do not meet the core mandatory requirements. The position requires 5-10 years of strong, hands-on C++ development on Windows, but the candidate's resume shows only a single 7-month C++ role from nearly a decade ago. Their entire recent career has been focused on web technologies (TypeScript, Node.js) and the DLang programming language. Furthermore, their limited experience in the financial domain was also with a web technology stack, not the C++ systems specified in the job description.
strengths: Extensive overall software development experience across various platforms.
Demonstrates initiative through founding a project and community involvement (talks, workshops).
Versatile polyglot developer with a broad skill set including modern web and cloud technologies.
concerns: Almost no professional C++ experience; the only relevant role was 7 months long and occurred nearly a decade ago.
No experience with C++ on the Windows platform in a financial or capital markets context.
Lacks the required domain expertise in Fixed Income, Capital Markets, or Investment Banking with a relevant C++ technology stack.
